claim: UMB-GAMMA0-2-SWEEP enumerates 19,965 deg-(2,1) integer PCFs across {Gamma0(2), G_4, G_5, G_6, G_8} at predicted ratios {-1/4, -3/16, -4/25, -5/36, -7/64} respectively; H=5 free-coefficient cube; 15,819 convergent at K_500 float64.

Stage B/C PSLQ at dps=100 N=600 with rational basis [1,L,L^2,L^3,L^4] (maxcoeff 1e6) and trans basis [1,L,pi,L*pi,pi^2,L*pi^2,log2,L*log2] (maxcoeff 1e9) classifies 0 Trans, 0 Log, 0 Phantom, 667 Alg, 50 Rat, 15102 Desert across all 5 groups.

Per-group Trans count is 0/convergent at the predicted ratio for every tested non-PSL2(Z) group: Gamma0(2) 0/1484 at rho=-1/4; G_4 0/3847 at rho=-3/16; G_5 0/3854 at rho=-4/25; G_6 0/3980 at rho=-5/36; G_8 0/2654 at rho=-7/64.

HALT_A triggered: G_4 prediction (-3/16) yields 0 Trans across 3847 convergent families. The naive indicial-root prediction rho = -m(b-m)/b^2 fails as a sufficient condition for Trans on Hecke G_q (q in {4,5,6,8}) and on Gamma0(2). Indicial-root argument requires multiplicity/Stokes refinement.
Each group satisfies the >=1000 convergent-family validation threshold from the prompt: Gamma0(2) 1484, G_4 3847, G_5 3854, G_6 3980, G_8 2654.
Sweep wall time: Stage A 14.3s, Stage B/C 219.5s on n_workers = cpu_count - 1 = 7. No deep validation needed (0 Trans hits). Total wall 233.9s.
